caption: A man wearing glasses, a white shirt, a red tie, and a dark navy blue suit jacket is speaking into a microphone. He is gesturing with his right arm extended to the side, and another person's hand is partially visible behind him. The scene is set outdoors against a plain, neutral-colored background. In the upper-left corner of each frame, a colorful logo appears above the text "plustv". A purple banner across the center of the screen reads "PLUS POLITICS" followed by a larger white text block that states "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Below this, a white bar contains the word "SUBSCRIBE" on the left and the URL "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA" on the right, though the URL is slightly fragmented in some frames. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a similar pose, with slight shifts in his facial expression and the position of his gesturing arm.
